title: Cuneiform Tablet #0627: Early Dynastic Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
